# MuleSoft XML Module

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.4) of XML Module documentation.
> See [XML Module llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/xml-module/llms-full.txt) for all the XML Module documentation in one file.

## Content

- [XML Module 1.3](https://docs.mulesoft.com/xml-module/latest/index.md)
- [XML Module Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/xml-module/latest/xml-module-examples.md)
- [Troubleshooting XML Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/xml-module/latest/xml-module-troubleshooting.md)
- [XML Module XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/xml-module/latest/xml-module-xml-maven.md)
- [XML Module Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/xml-module/latest/xml-reference.md)
- [Validate Documents Against an XSD Schema with the XML Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/xml-module/latest/xml-schema-validation.md)
- [Using XPath with the XML Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/xml-module/latest/xml-xpath.md)
- [Using XQuery with the XML Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/xml-module/latest/xml-xquery.md)
- [XSLT Transformations with the XML Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/xml-module/latest/xml-xslt.md)
